commands.title: Auto Mode: Run Reviewed Shell Command

autoMode.enabled.description: When enabled, PreToolUse hook requests for run_in_terminal are reviewed by the extension-host bridge. When disabled, shell tools are allowed without local model/path review (host still runs the command).

autoMode.modelProvider.description: Model provider for hook-time shell review in the extension host (direct HTTP, not VS Code Language Model API). Supported values: "anthropic", "openai".

autoMode.modelName.description: Provider-specific model id used for PreToolUse review (run_in_terminal) when using the local bridge, for example claude-3-7-sonnet-latest or gpt-4.1.

autoMode.apiKey.description: API key for the configured provider. Required for the extension-host hook bridge and review engine; stored in user/workspace settings like other secrets.

autoMode.anthropicBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the Anthropic Messages API base URL. Omit to use the default public endpoint.

autoMode.openaiBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the OpenAI Chat Completions API base URL. Omit to use the default public endpoint.

autoMode.modelTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for model completion requests used by the hook bridge review path.

scripts.prepackage: npm run clean:package && npm run build
